Jessica Harper
Phoenix, AZ

Summary
Detail-oriented and efficient Picker/Packer with over 4 years of experience in fast-paced warehouse environments. Proven ability to handle physical demands of the job, including standing for long periods and lifting heavy items. Committed to maintaining accuracy and quality in all tasks, with a strong focus on meeting deadlines.

Experience
Warehouse Associate
ABC Logistics, Phoenix, AZ
March 2021 - Present  
- Efficiently pick and pack orders for shipment, consistently achieving an accuracy rate of over 98%.  
- Maintain organization in the warehouse, ensuring that items are properly stored and easily accessible.  
- Collaborate with team members to improve workflow and reduce order processing time.  
- Regularly lift and move packages up to 50 lbs, demonstrating physical stamina and strength.

Picker/Packer  
XYZ Distribution Center, Phoenix, AZ  
June 2019 - February 2021  
- Selected and packed products for shipment in a high-volume warehouse, fulfilling up to 300 orders daily.  
- Conducted quality checks to ensure that all items met company standards before dispatch.  
- Assisted in training new employees on safe lifting techniques and packing procedures.  
- Engaged in continuous improvement initiatives that enhanced efficiency by 15%.
